hero.tagline: Building Intelligent Systems with AI & Automation
hero.description:
Senior Intelligent Solutions Engineer with over 10+ years of experience designing, integrating, and supporting intelligent transportation systems across the UAE and international projects. 

Passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Vision, automation, and building reliable solutions for smart cities.
currentFocus: Scaling AI-driven ITS platforms across the UAE
Machine vision R&D for smart traffic enforcement

about.heading: About Me
about.subheading: A bit about my background and how I work.
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Engineer with a background spanning intelligent transportation systems, infrastructure engineering, and software development. Over the past 6+ years I've worked across the full stack of ITS delivery — from field installation and calibration to building the software that monitors and controls those systems.

My MSc in Artificial Intelligence sharpened my focus on applying machine learning to real engineering problems: classifying vehicle types from trajectory data, predicting system faults before they happen, and automating workflows that used to take hours of manual work.
I care about building things that are reliable in production, not just accurate in a notebook — clear interfaces, sensible defaults, and systems that fail safely.

experience.description: Leading system integration and software delivery for ITS deployments, including monitoring dashboards, remote control interfaces, and field calibration support.
Built automation tooling and web interfaces for infrastructure monitoring systems, reducing manual configuration time significantly across multiple sites.
Installed, calibrated, and troubleshot traffic enforcement hardware and supporting systems across multiple sites and countries.

projectsSubtitle: Professional engineering, AI, and research projects.

projects.title: AI-Based Vehicle Type Classification
projects.description: Developed a machine learning model to classify vehicle types using the NGSIM US-101 dataset, achieving over 99% classification accuracy through vehicle-level feature engineering and model optimization.

projects.title: MU Control Web Interface
projects.description: Web application for monitoring and controlling MU systems with real-time status and remote commands.

projects.title: Traffic Enforcement Support
projects.description: Field engineering support for traffic enforcement systems including installation, calibration and troubleshooting.

articles.title: Classifying Vehicle Types from Trajectory Data
articles.excerpt: How aggregating NGSIM trajectories to the vehicle level avoids data leakage and improves model reliability.

articles.title: Notes on Building Reliable ITS Software
articles.excerpt: Lessons from years of field deployments — why simple, observable systems beat clever ones.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.subheading: Have a project in mind or just want to connect? I'm always open to discussing new opportunities.
